body_txt: Often used as a cheap and easy way to make a name into a pun. Just stick a Mc or Mac onto the front and everyone will know that it's a surname. Of course you can do this with any other common onomastic prefix or suffix: e.g., Paddy O'Adjective, Hassan Ibn Description, Baron Von Word, Verbal Verbson etc. A common feature of Buffy Speak and Big, Stupid Doodoo-Head . Sometimes used in snarking . Compare Awesome McCoolname .
